summary: Hardens the installed Planban runtime, resolves the Vite/esbuild audit path, and ships the held-back archive and launch polish.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: Planban public installs now include the built web app and prefer that static runtime when launched from the plugin or MCP tools. The Vite/esbuild dependency chain has been updated and pinned to the fixed patch line, release preflight now blocks high-severity dependency audit findings, and the held-back board/launch polish is included for updater dogfooding.
